sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105287" key="trisullabe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρι-συλλᾰβέω</orth>, <sense id="n105287.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">consist of three syllables,</tr_> Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0033.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:927" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.927</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
